stories.title: Cisco posts best day since 2011 on strong AI demand, CEO says tech is entering a 'networking supercycle'
stories.summary: Shares headed for their best day in more than two decades after Cisco blew past its AI infrastructure and hyperscaler orders guidance for the fiscal year

stories.title: Musk’s xAI Unveils First Coding Agent in Bid to Rival Anthropic
stories.summary: Elon Musk’s xAI is rolling out its first artificial intelligence coding agent, called Grok Build, in an attempt to catch up to Anthropic PBC’s Claude on streamlining software development.

stories.title: Applied Materials’ Sales Forecast Gets Boost From AI Demand
stories.summary: Applied Materials Inc., the largest US supplier of semiconductor equipment, gave sales and profit forecasts that far exceeded analysts’ estimates, fueled by soaring demand for AI computing and memory chips.

stories.summary: Cerebras is taking advantage of a bull market for silicon, as the chipmaker becomes one of the most notable pureplay AI IPOs to date.

stories.title: Dow Is Hardly Moving Anything Through Hormuz, CEO Says
stories.summary: Dow Chair and CEO Jim Fitterling says the company is "hardly moving anything" through the Strait of Hormuz due to the war in Iran. He says it could take 275 days for things to get back to normal after the waterway is reopened. He speaks to Bloomberg's Caroline Hyde on the sidelines of the Spark Summit in California. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: Nearly 40% chances of stagflation by end of 2026, traders say
stories.summary: Traders are not optimistic about the state of economy by the end of this year, placing high chances of stagflation, a mix of high inflation and unemployment.

stories.title: Cerebras CEO Is Worth $3.2 Billion After Year’s Largest IPO

stories.title: Xi Warns Trump About Taiwan

stories.title: AI Buildout Drives 76% Power Bill Jump on Largest US Grid
stories.summary: Power prices on the largest electric grid in the US jumped 76% in the first quarter due to rampant demand from data centers, adding to pressure on its operator to alleviate the strain on consumers.

stories.summary: Cerebras Systems Inc. shares jumped 81% in its trading debut on the Nasdaq, after the artificial intelligence chipmaker and data center firm raised $5.55 billion in the year’s largest initial public offering. Bloomberg's Norah Mulinda is tracking the action for us. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: Cisco Soars on Forecast Boost, AI-Focused Job Cuts
stories.summary: Cisco Systems Inc. jumped by the most in more than 14 years after the company delivered a better-than-anticipated sales forecast and announced plans to cut thousands of jobs, an attempt to focus on the fast-growing AI market. stories.title: AI Chipmaker Cerebras Raises $5.55 Billion in Year’s Biggest IPO
stories.summary: Cerebras raised $5.55 billion in its US initial public offering, as the AI chipmaker seizes on the surging demand for semiconductors. This is the largest IPO of the year so far. Shares were priced to open 89% above their listing price. Cerebras CEO Andrew Feldman joined Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" before the stock started trading and called it a "pretty good day." (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: Winklevosses Invest $100 Million in Battered Gemini Exchange
stories.summary: Tyler and Cameron Winklevoss, the billionaire twins who founded Gemini Space Station Inc., made a $100 million “strategic investment” into the money-losing crypto exchange.

stories.title: Why Rare Earths Are China’s Trump Card in Trade War
